name: Nagumomu Ganaleni

pallavi.meaning: Without seeing your smiling face, what happiness is there for me?

anupallavi.meaning: Is this the face that, when seen in this world, moves me with compassion?

charanams.original_telugu: పర మాత్ముడవై వెలసే నిను పాలించే నిను
charanams.iast: para māṭmuḍavai velasē ninu pāliñcē ninu
charanams.meaning: You who shone forth as the Supreme Self, you who protects me

additional_notes: A masterpiece in Abheri raga, one of the most emotionally expressive kritis of Tyagaraja. The raga itself is derived from Natabhairavi (20th Melakarta).
